title: T-084 — Technical sensory evaluation contract/read model
prompt:
# T-084 — Technical sensory evaluation contract/read model

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §0, §5, §17, prototypes/design/03-TECHNICAL-UX.md
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Technical sensory evaluation contract/read model

Define a Technical-owned sensory evaluation contract/read model for product/project/work-order sensory evidence. NPD approval may treat sensory as N/A/not_required unless org policy requires it; this task gives NPD and Quality a stable Technical read adapter for required/pending/pass/fail/hold states without moving NPD gate ownership into Technical. Include schema/API contract and tests only; no UI/prototype implementation.

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- apps/web/lib/technical/sensory/*.ts [create]
- db/migrations/0xxx_technical_sensory.sql [create]
- tests/lib/technical/sensory-contract.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given org policy requires sensory for a product, Technical read model exposes required/pending/pass/fail status to NPD approval.
2. Given sensory is not required, adapter returns not_required and NPD can proceed without fake Technical evidence.
3. Given sensory result is fail/hold, downstream release guards can show SENSORIAL_BLOCKED reason.

## Test strategy
- RED contract tests for required/not_required/pass/fail/hold mapping.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/lib/technical/sensory-contract.test.ts

## Risk red lines
- Do not move NPD gate ownership into Technical.
- Do not implement external lab/sensory vendor integrations.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
